description: Collects custom dimension values for session and event dimensions. Create custom dimensions first in Analytics > Settings > Custom dimensions, then use a variable to capture the value. For event dimensions, this tag must fire before the Piwik PRO tracking tag (use higher priority).

when_to_use: Sending session or event custom dimension values to Piwik PRO
Passing user attributes (role, plan, segment) as dimensions
Enriching page view or event data with custom context
Using variables to dynamically set dimension values

template_options.description: Configuration for custom dimensions. Must include custom_dimensions array.

template_options.custom_dimensions.description: Array of custom dimension objects. Each has id (dimension slot 1-400) and value (string, number, boolean, or variable reference like {{ Variable }}).

structure.id: integer (1-400) - Custom dimension slot ID from Analytics > Settings > Custom dimensions
structure.value: string|number|boolean or variable reference - Value to send

priority.description: Firing order. For event dimensions, use higher priority than the Piwik PRO tag so this fires first.

disable_in_debug_mode.description: Disable when Tag Manager is in debug mode

session_dimension.description: Send user role as session custom dimension
session_dimension.prerequisite: Create custom dimension slot 1 in Analytics > Settings > Custom dimensions. Create a variable for User Role.

event_dimension_high_priority.description: Event dimension must fire before Piwik PRO tag (higher priority)
event_dimension_high_priority.note: Use priority higher than the Piwik PRO tag so this runs before the page view is tracked.

common_mistakes: Omitting template_options.custom_dimensions or passing empty array
Using dimension id not created in Analytics > Settings > Custom dimensions
For event dimensions: not setting higher priority than Piwik PRO tag
Forgetting to create a variable for dynamic values

dimension_not_recorded: Verify custom dimension exists in Analytics > Settings > Custom dimensions
Check dimension id matches the slot (1-400)
For event dimensions: ensure this tag has higher priority than Piwik PRO tag
Verify triggers are attached and firing
wrong_value_recorded: Check variable resolves correctly (use debug mode)
Ensure variable fires before this tag
